description: Customer wants to buy a pair of running shoes currently sold out in size 10.5 and requests an automated SMS notification upon restock.
system_prompt: You are an e-commerce inventory and restock notification AI. Check warehouse inbound schedules and configure automated customer alerts.
user_conversation: The Apex Pro running shoes in Blue size 10.5 are out of stock. Do you know when you will get more in?
Can you set up a text message alert to my phone number ending in 4432 as soon as they are restocked?

conversation.user: The Apex Pro running shoes in Blue size 10.5 are out of stock. Do you know when you will get more in?
conversation.assistant: Our inventory shipment schedule shows that we are receiving a fresh warehouse restock of the Apex Pro running shoes in Blue size 10.5 next Friday, July 11th.

conversation.user: Can you set up a text message alert to my phone number ending in 4432 as soon as they are restocked?
conversation.assistant: I have registered a high-priority SMS restock notification for phone number ending in 4432. You will receive an instant text message with a direct 1-click checkout link the moment size 10.5 is checked into our inventory.
conversation.expected: I have registered an SMS restock alert for phone ending in 4432 to send you an instant text with a checkout link as soon as size 10.5 arrives.

expected_behavior: Chatbot states expected inventory arrival date (July 11th) and confirms SMS restock notification enrollment with 1-click checkout link.
expected_answer: The Apex Pro running shoes in Blue size 10.5 are scheduled for restock on Friday, July 11th. I have enrolled your phone ending in 4432 for an instant SMS alert with a checkout link the moment they arrive.
